docs.title: Why Gaming Matters
docs.text: Gaming supports social connection, skill development, and mental health.

docs.title: Pathway
docs.text:
1. Complete the self-assessment
  2. Explore equipment
  3. Review real setups
  4. Connect with community

Check out the GAME Checkpoints.

Link: GAME Checkpoints Page
